task_completion.description: The IRCADb CT volume is successfully loaded into 3D Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface is visible with the axial, sagittal, and coronal views populated with medical imaging data (grey-scale CT slices).

task_completion.description: The agent has navigated the views to the liver/abdominal region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice views show the cross-section of the liver (large organ on the patient's right side) and the portal vein (bright tubular structure).

task_completion.description: The Markups module is active or the fiducial placement tool is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Markups' module panel is visible on the left sidebar, or the mouse cursor indicates fiducial placement mode.

task_completion.description: A fiducial marker is visually placed at the portal vein bifurcation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A colored marker/dot is visible in the slice views specifically at the junction where the main portal vein trunk splits into left and right branches (Y-shape).
In the Markups module list (usually on the left panel), the control point is explicitly named 'PortalBifurcation'.

task_completion.description: The markup file is saved to the correct path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Data' dialog or file browser is visible showing the destination folder '~/Documents/SlicerData/IRCADb/' and filename 'portal_bifurcation.mrk.json'.

integrity.description: The agent did not create the output file directly via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Slicer GUI, not just a terminal window executing 'echo' or 'cat' commands to generate the JSON.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the 3D Slicer application interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual indicators of mouse clicks, tool selection, or menu navigation within the Slicer window.

integrity.description: The agent did not programmatically set coordinates using known ground truth values in the Python console.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Python console (if visible) does not show commands directly setting fiducial coordinates without visual navigation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected fiducial name is 'PortalBifurcation'. The target anatomy is the portal vein bifurcation in the liver (where the main bright vessel splits). The output file must be saved to ~/Documents/SlicerData/IRCADb/portal_bifurcation.mrk.json.
